function solve(m: number, n: number, waitCost: number[][]): number {

    // Initialize distance array: dist[i][j][p], p is 0 or 1

    const INF = Number.MAX_VALUE;

    const dist = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => new Array(2).fill(INF)));

    // The initial state is (0,0) with parity 1 (odd time step), cost is entry cost of (0,0)

    const entryCost = (i: number, j: number) => (i + 1) * (j + 1);

    dist[0][0][1] = entryCost(0, 0);

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    const pq: [number, number, number, number][] = [];

    pq.push([dist[0][0][1], 0, 0, 1]);

    // Dijkstra's algorithm

    while (pq.length > 0) {

        // Get the node with the minimal cost

        pq.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);

        const [currentCost, i, j, p] = pq.shift()!;

        // Check if we have reached the destination

        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {

            return currentCost;

        }

        // If current cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip

        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][p]) {

            continue;

        }

        // Process transitions based on parity

        if (p === 1) { // odd time step: must move

            // Possible moves: right or down

            const directions: [number, number][] = [[0, 1], [1, 0]];

            for (const [di, dj] of directions) {

                const ni = i + di;

                const nj = j + dj;

                if (ni < m && nj < n) {

                    // new parity is 0 (even time step)

                    const new_p = 0;

                    const new_cost = currentCost + entryCost(ni, nj);

                    if (new_cost < dist[ni][nj][new_p]) {

                        dist[ni][nj][new_p] = new_cost;

                        pq.push([new_cost, ni, nj, new_p]);

                    }

                }

            }

        } else { // even time step: must wait

            // stay in the same cell, new_p is 1

            const new_p = 1;

            const new_cost = currentCost + waitCost[i][j];

function solve(m: number, n: number, waitCost: number[][]): number {

    // Initialize distance array: dist[i][j][p], p is 0 or 1

    const INF = Number.MAX_VALUE;

    const dist = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => new Array(2).fill(INF)));

    // The initial state is (0,0) with parity 1 (odd time step), cost is entry cost of (0,0)

    const entryCost = (i: number, j: number) => (i + 1) * (j + 1);

    dist[0][0][1] = entryCost(0, 0);

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    const pq: [number, number, number, number][] = [];

    pq.push([dist[0][0][1], 0, 0, 1]);

    // Dijkstra's algorithm

    while (pq.length > 0) {

        // Get the node with the minimal cost

        pq.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);

        const [currentCost, i, j, p] = pq.shift()!;

        // Check if we have reached the destination

        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {

            return currentCost;

        }

        // If current cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip

        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][p]) {

            continue;

        }

        // Process transitions based on parity

        if (p === 1) { // odd time step: must move

            // Possible moves: right or down

            const directions: [number, number][] = [[0, 1], [1, 0]];

            for (const [di, dj] of directions) {

                const ni = i + di;

                const nj = j + dj;

                if (ni < m && nj < n) {

                    // new parity is 0 (even time step)

                    const new_p = 0;

                    const new_cost = currentCost + entryCost(ni, nj);

                    if (new_cost < dist[ni][nj][new_p]) {

                        dist[ni][nj][new_p] = new_cost;

                        pq.push([new_cost, ni, nj, new_p]);

                    }

                }

            }

        } else { // even time step: must wait

            // stay in the same cell, new_p is 1

            const new_p = 1;

            const new_cost = currentCost + waitCost[i][j];

            if (new_cost < dist[i][j][new_p]) {

                dist[i][j][new_p] = new_cost;

                pq.push([new_cost, i, j, new_p]);

            }

        }

    }

    // If not found (should not happen)

    return -1;

}
